S.FORM: cinmman tayal hiya ka maki sazing lahuy,te qutux ka "tmami",te sazing ka "zmkani".
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨinmman tajal ħija ka maki s~ɕaziŋ laħuj,te qutux ka "tmami",te s~ɕaziŋ ka "zmkani".
S.FORM: cinmman tayal hiya ka maki sazing lahuy,te qutux ka "tmami",te sazing ka "zmkani".
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨinmman tajal ħija ka maki s~ɕaziŋ laħuj,te qutux ka "tmami",te s~ɕaziŋ ka "zmkani".
